inclusionQuotes.text: We're a cutting-edge technology company, constantly taking on new challenges in the worlds of milliseconds and terabytes. We need help from people who like to move fast, tackle the big stuff, and have an immediate impact. Sound like you?

inclusionQuotes.heading: We build awesome things

inclusionQuotes.text: From Oakley Meta Vanguard to Oakley Meta HTSN, this is the next evolution of AI glasses. Oakley and Meta have joined forces to bring AI glasses to sports and everyday lifestyles, combining Oakley's eye-catching style with Meta's innovative wearable and AI technology. Built for life on the field, trail, or track, with everyday use cases, Oakley Meta is here to evolve sport and enhance performance.
inclusionQuotes.heading: We build awesome things

inclusionQuotes.text: Meta Ray-Ban Display and Meta Neural Band are redefining the way people connect. inclusionQuotes.heading: We build awesome things

Whatever role each of us plays — engineer, analyst, strategist, designer — our best work comes through collaboration and combining our collective skills.
Explore our featured roles and join our mission to build the future of human connection.
Every day, we redefine and build a future that’s more open, accessible, and focused on human connection.
Teamwork drives innovation, cultivates human connection and supports constant learning.
Join us to build the future of human connection and the technology that makes it possible.
We’re building more than future technology — we’re building a community of creators and developers.
Put your skills to work as we build for the future of AI — today At Meta, we want you to build a career where you’re challenged, valued, and learning from the best.
Come work alongside passionate individuals who are excited to learn and love what they do.
We do more than make great technologies — we create awe and inspiration.
At the forefront of innovation, the possibilities are endless Work with the brightest AI minds to build the future of human connection.
Together we can build awesome things.
See how a role in AI at Meta can help you drive the future of education, healthcare, finance, cybersecurity and more.
AI is influencing the metaverse in mind-blowing ways and we’re staying a step ahead.
Innovate the leading spatial platform and new devices Our teams create new ways to connect in the metaverse and take wearables beyond gaming.
From our Llama collection of open-source large language models to immersive virtual reality headsets and Ray-Ban Meta glasses, we’re making our vast world feel smaller and more connected.
Build the next generation of AI openly and responsibly Meta is all in on building the future of AI with Llama, our open-source collection of models.

We build next-generation hardware and software like Meta Quest headsets, AR wearables and Ray-Ban AI glasses that do everything from assisting surgeons with training to creating virtual classrooms to “seeing” the world from home.
Our signature events connect us with the wider Meta community to explore tomorrow’s tech and inspire big ideas.
